title: [Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-1: `restore-session` is unauthenticated → cache-poisoning + #613 bound-check drift
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-2: Terraform state backend (`tf_backend.py`) has zero auth and a broken UNLOCK method
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-3: `routers/auth.py::get_current_user` is a route handler used as `Depends` — anon callers silently land in `default_org`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-4: Jobs router fully unauthenticated → BOLA on async analysis/IaC/HLD results
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-5: `auth.get_user_from_session(token: str)` used as `Depends` — token silently read from `?token=` query
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-6: `routers/drift.py` — module-level `_BASELINES` dict + no auth on any route
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-7: `share_routes.py` — DELETE share has no auth; stats endpoint leaks for anonymous shares
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-8: `IMAGE_STORE`/`SESSION_STORE` use `FileStore` on per-replica `/tmp` — multi-replica deploys silently lose data
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-9: `network_routes._topology_cache` unbounded module dict — leak + multi-replica unsafe
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-10: `/api/admin/suggestions/*` admin routes guard with user-tier `verify_api_key` instead of `verify_admin_key`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-11: `/api/v1/api/...` double-prefix bug — `icon_router` mirrored under wrong path
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BE-12: `/api/import/{terraform,cloudformation,arm}` accept up to 30 MB anonymously
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-1: `LoginModal` not an accessible dialog — no `role`, no `aria-modal`, no Esc, no focus trap
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-2: `ProfilePage` modal repeats every `LoginModal` a11y gap (plus broken backdrop close)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-3: Sign In trigger box mis-aligns with sibling Nav controls on mobile
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-4: `toRenderableString` not applied at multiple list-of-objects render sites — #636 leak still alive
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-5: `apiClient` default methods strip the auth token — every workflow request goes anonymous
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-6: `ProfilePage` and parts of `useAuthStore` only honor `localStorage` — SWA cookie users authenticate to nothing
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-7: Tailwind `dark:` variants on auth/deploy panels decoupled from app's `data-theme` toggle
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-8: `ErrorBoundary` doesn't reset on tab change — one bad tab kills navigation
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-9: `DeployPanel` bypasses `apiClient` entirely — no auth, no retry, no timeout, no error mapping
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-10: `loginWithProvider` drops query/hash on round-trip — users land on different tab
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-11: Sign In trigger lacks accessible name on mobile + missing `aria-haspopup="dialog"`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-FE-12: Vision-cache TTL collision with #636 — pre-coercion entries persist in `sessionStorage`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-1: LoginModal lacks dialog semantics, focus trap, Esc, scroll-lock
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-2: Sign In modal overflows on short viewports — content cut off, not scrollable (root cause of user report)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-3: Provider button `dark:` classes never fire — app uses `data-theme`, not Tailwind class/media dark mode
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-4: Sign In trigger collapses to ~28×28 tap target on mobile and loses accessible name
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-5: Auth flow doesn't restore focus after modal close → keyboard users lose place
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-6: Empty/loading/error states inconsistent across DiagramTranslator panels
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-7: Error microcopy leaks raw exception strings; no toast/snackbar contract
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-8: ExportHub error state is icon-only with no reason and no per-row retry
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-9: UserMenu dropdown lacks proper menu semantics, Esc, roving focus
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-10: ProfilePage form labels not programmatically linked to controls
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-11: HLDPanel uses hardcoded Tailwind palette instead of theme tokens — breaks dark/light parity
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-12: GuidedQuestions Expert/Guided toggle uses same icon family with inverted meaning
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-UX-13: DeployPanel "Coming Soon" overlay has empty `pointer-events-auto` card with no focus order
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-1: IaC self-reflection verification step doubles GPT-4o latency on `/generate`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-2: IMAGE_STORE byte-budget is dead code; eviction count-only and base64 inflates payload 33%
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-3: Sync enrichment block runs on event loop inside async `/analyze`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-4: AgentRunner uses sync `SessionLocal()` inside async coroutine; tools execute serially
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-5: Vision prompt-hash truncates to 200 chars — SYSTEM_PROMPT changes never invalidate cache
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-6: Vision images base64 round-tripped 3× per analyze
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-7: Sync embedding call inside DB write path holds connections for 200–800ms
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-8: pgvector context retrieval issues two sequential ORDER-BY queries
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-9: ExportHub generates all selected deliverables serially in `for...await` loop
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-10: LandingZoneViewer parses + sanitizes 300KB SVG twice on main thread
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-11: IaC chat history sends full code on every turn — quadratic token growth
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-PERF-12: Vision response cache sized at 100 entries — thrashes on burst
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-1: `apiClient.js` ignores `Authorization` for all non-`/auth` calls — server treats every authenticated user as anonymous
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-2: Token caps inconsistent across HLD generation paths — same logical request returns different completeness
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-3: `/api/diagrams/{id}/iac/chat` exposes `current_code` from request body — no server-side anchor → tampering / drift
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-4: SSE token endpoints stream secrets bypassing tenant isolation when `?tenant_id=` is supplied as query param
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-5: Health endpoints leak internal version, dependency status, and config feature flags
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-6: `/api/v1/deployments/preflight` accepts arbitrary inputs — no `Pydantic` validation
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-7: Migration-chat streams Azure OpenAI responses with no abort propagation — orphaned upstream calls cost money
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-8: CORS allowlist mixes `*` and origin-specific values — credentials sent to wildcard subset
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-9: `/api/diagrams/{id}/migration-chat` ignores `Authorization` for ownership; uses `diagram_id` only
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-10: OpenAPI schema drift — frontend types and backend responses diverge for `/diagrams/{id}/analyze`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-11: `/api/governance/runs` accepts arbitrary nested JSON for rules; uses jsonschema only at write time
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-12: Inconsistent rate-limit responses — some routes return 429 with `Retry-After`, others 503
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-API-13: Activity stream WebSocket drops silently after 60s idle — no heartbeat
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-1: No automated regression test for the user-reported "Sign In box not aligned with screen"
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-2: `apiClient` test suite has no coverage of auth header propagation; F-FE-5 invisible to CI
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-3: Vision-cache hash regression (F-PERF-5) has no test
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-4: E2E pipeline doesn't cover full upload→analyze→IaC→export-all path
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-5: Backend test fixtures don't exercise multi-tenant boundaries
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-6: Token-streaming (SSE) tests don't simulate client disconnect
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-7: Vitest config doesn't fail on console errors — React #31 invisible to CI
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-8: Performance budget not enforced in CI — F-PERF-1 / F-PERF-9 ship undetected
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-9: A11y test coverage stops at axe-core static scan — focus order not asserted
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-10: Mutation testing not enforced — coverage is misleading
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-11: Flaky tests masked by retries — `pytest --reruns 3` hides race conditions
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-12: Frontend "all errors silently swallow" pattern — `try { } catch { console.error }` everywhere
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-QA-13: CI doesn't smoke-test deploy plan — Terraform/Bicep generation regressions undetected
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-1: Cross-tenant data exposure on observability SSE — `tenant_id` taken from query param
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-2: `apiClient.js` strips token on every workflow request — auth bypassed by design (F-FE-5)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-3: IaC chat tampering via client-supplied `current_code` (F-API-3)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-4: Vision input + raw error string concatenation enables prompt-injection persistence (F-PERF-5 root)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-5: CORS may allow `*` with `credentials=true` (F-API-8)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-6: Public health endpoint discloses model + region + flags (F-API-5)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-7: Container Apps secrets stored in env vars without Key Vault references for prod
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-8: Rate-limit middleware uses in-memory token bucket per replica — bypassable via load balancing
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-9: SSRF surface: `/api/diagrams/upload-url` accepts arbitrary URLs for fetching remote diagrams
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-10: Logs may include OAuth tokens — no scrubber on token-streaming exception paths
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-11: CSP missing on FastAPI responses — only frontend index.html sets it
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-12: CSRF protection absent for cookie-auth (SWA) routes
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-SEC-13: Audit log entries missing actor + IP for guest-mode actions
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-1: Branch protection paths-ignore deadlock — ignored-only PRs can never merge
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-2: Deploy workflow doesn't gate on infra `terraform plan` review for prod
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-3: Container image not pinned by digest in deploy step
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-4: Backend Dockerfile runs as root — no `USER` directive
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-5: CI doesn't run `pip-audit` / `npm audit` / Trivy on every PR
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-6: Health probe uses GET `/api/health` which exposes leaked info (F-API-5)
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-7: No `pre-commit` hooks for secret scanning
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-8: Test database uses real Postgres but no clean-state fixture — flaky parallel runs
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-9: Frontend build doesn't fail on TypeScript / typecheck errors
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-10: No alerts on Container Apps replica restart count
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-11: Rollback path undocumented — no `azd down`/`tf destroy` runbook
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-12: Alembic migration testing not part of CI smoke
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-13: CodeQL workflow disabled or absent
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-DO-14: Frontend env-var secrets risk — `VITE_` prefix may leak service-side keys
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-1: Single Azure region — no DR plan for Azure OpenAI / Postgres / Container Apps outage
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-2: Postgres Flexible Server uses local SSD with no point-in-time recovery beyond 7 days
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-3: ACR set to `Basic` SKU — no geo-replication and image scanning unavailable
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-4: Postgres + Redis publicly reachable — `public_network_access_enabled=true`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-5: No Azure Policy assignments for tagging / region restriction / SKU governance
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-6: Diagnostic settings missing on Postgres / Redis / Container Apps
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-7: Front Door / API Management not in front of Container Apps
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-8: Cost alerts not configured on AOAI deployment
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-9: Managed Identity not used for AOAI access — API key in env var
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-10: Container Apps autoscale rules use only HTTP concurrency, not custom metrics
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-11: Storage Account for blobs missing customer-managed keys
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-12: App Insights sampling at 100% — log storm cost risk
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-13: Network security groups absent on Container Apps subnet
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-CL-14: No infrastructure tests — `terraform-compliance` / `checkov` not in CI
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BUG-1: ROOT CAUSE: Sign-in modal not aligned to viewport — `backdrop-filter` on Nav header creates containing block for `position:fixed` descendants
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BUG-2: `useAuthStore.initialize()` race — first paint shows logged-out shell even when SWA cookie present
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BUG-3: `useEffect(() => fetch(...), [])` lacks AbortController in `MigrationDashboard`
[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BUG-4: Race: `IaCViewer` apply-changes button can fire twice on double-click

[Audit 2026-05-08] F-BUG-8: `Diagram.iac_terraform` updated without version bump — concurrent edits silently overwrite
